title: Flooring Systems for Sports Courts - Elite South Texas
content:
Sports Courts
Fluid-applied resinous or polymer-modified cement coatings are ideal for sports courts due to their durability, seamless finish, and customizability. These materials provide a strong, joint-free surface that enhances safety by minimizing tripping hazards and can be tailored with markings, textures, and slip-resistant additives to suit various sports. They resist wear, impacts, moisture, and stains, ensuring longevity and low maintenance, while offering quick installation to reduce downtime. Additionally, they can be enhanced for shock absorption, improving player comfort and reducing injury risks. Their versatility, cost-effectiveness, and ability to withstand high traffic make them a superior choice for both indoor and outdoor sports facilitiies.
Advantages
Custom logos and floor markings
Easy to clean and maintain
Ultra-durable, high abrasion resistance withstands heavy traffic
Fluid applied systems for new construction or existing floor restoration
Finish options include gloss or satin
Adjustable slip resistance based on requirements
Antimicrobial and stain resistant
Seamless, impermeable and non-porous flooring
Gymnasium flooring
Concession areas
Locker rooms and restrooms
Interior and exterior sports surfaces
Entranceways and lobbies
Supply, utility, and mechanical rooms
